hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】下一任美联储主席的投资组合中有加密货币敞口。这是详细信息；【CRYPTO】SOL、ADA、DOGE 回调，比特币维持在 74,000 美元上方，亚洲收复伊朗战争损失；【FINANCE】尽管伊朗战争，中国机器人出租车公司仍继续在阿联酋扩张。

items.title: The next Fed chair has crypto exposure in his portfolio. Here are the details
items.summary: Kevin Warsh's financial disclosure reveals stakes in DeFi protocols, Ethereum scaling networks, a Bitcoin Lightning startup, and prediction markets — all of which he's promised to sell.
items.title_zh: 下一任美联储主席的投资组合中有加密货币敞口。这是详细信息
items.summary_zh: Kevin Warsh 的财务披露披露了他在 DeFi 协议、以太坊扩展网络、比特币闪电初创公司和预测市场中的股份——他承诺出售所有这些股份。

items.title: SOL, ADA, DOGE pull back, bitcoin holds above $74,000 as Asia recoups Iran war losses
items.summary: China's CSI 300 joins Taiwan and Singapore in erasing war-related declines as US-Iran talk optimism keeps oil below $100; spot ETFs posted $471 million in single-day inflows last week.
items.title_zh: SOL、ADA、DOGE 回调，比特币维持在 74,000 美元上方，亚洲收复伊朗战争损失
items.summary_zh: 由于美伊谈判的乐观情绪使油价跌破 100 美元，中国沪深 300 指数与台湾和新加坡一起消除了与战争相关的跌幅；现货 ETF 上周单日资金流入 4.71 亿美元。

items.title: Chinese robotaxi companies forge ahead with UAE expansion despite Iran war
items.summary: Ride-hailing company Didi plans to begin its first overseas robotaxi test in the United Arab Emirates later this year.
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗战争，中国机器人出租车公司仍继续在阿联酋扩张
items.summary_zh: 网约车公司滴滴计划今年晚些时候在阿拉伯联合酋长国开始其首次海外机器人出租车测试。

items.title: Prediction markets will grow to $1 trillion by 2030, Bernstein estimates
items.summary: The investment bank said volumes will reach an estimated $240 billion in 2026 and grow at a 80% compound annual rate between 2025 and 2030.
items.title_zh: Bernstein 估计，到 2030 年，预测市场将增长到 1 万亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该投资银行表示，预计 2026 年交易量将达到 2400 亿美元，并在 2025 年至 2030 年间以 80% 的复合年增长率增长。

items.title: Treasury Secretary Bessent backs rate cuts but says he understands if the Fed wants to wait
items.summary: Bessent has previously said the Fed should hasten cutting interest rates, calling reductions "the only ingredient missing" for stronger economic growth.
items.title_zh: 财政部长贝森特支持降息，但表示他理解美联储是否愿意等待
items.summary_zh: 贝森特此前曾表示，美联储应加快降息，称降息是经济增长强劲的“唯一缺失的因素”。

items.title: China exports growth in March misses estimates, imports surge most in over four years
items.summary: China's export growth slowed in March as manufacturers grappled with surging energy costs, with the Iran war disrupting supplies, while imports jumped more than expected.
items.title_zh: 中国3月份出口增速低于预期，进口增幅为四年多来最大
items.summary_zh: 由于制造商努力应对能源成本飙升以及伊朗战争扰乱供应，中国三月份出口增长放缓，而进口增幅超出预期。

items.title: U.S. Says Israel and Lebanon Agree to More Peace Talks
items.summary: Fighting continued in southern Lebanon between Israel and Iranian-backed Hezbollah militants, even as Israeli and Lebanese diplomats met in Washington. The war in Lebanon has threatened to undermine the U.S.-Iran cease-fire.
items.title_zh: 美国称以色列和黎巴嫩同意进行更多和平谈判
items.summary_zh: 尽管以色列和黎巴嫩外交官在华盛顿会面，但以色列和伊朗支持的真主党武装分子在黎巴嫩南部的战斗仍在继续。黎巴嫩战争有可能破坏美伊停火。

items.title: As War Chills Economy, Dubai’s Most Vulnerable Bear the Cost
items.summary: Migrant workers in the United Arab Emirates, whose hospitality industry has been hit hard by the war with Iran, are facing furloughs, pay cuts and even repatriation.
items.title_zh: 战争使经济陷入寒冬，迪拜最脆弱的群体承受了代价
items.summary_zh: 阿拉伯联合酋长国的酒店业因与伊朗的战争而受到严重打击，他们的移民工人正面临休假、减薪甚至遣返的问题。

items.title: Russian Oil Revenues Nearly Doubled in March
items.summary: The surge in revenue provided a critical lifeline for Moscow, which has struggled to fund the war in Ukraine amid record-high deficits.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯三月份石油收入几乎翻倍
items.summary_zh: 收入的激增为莫斯科提供了重要的生命线，莫斯科在创纪录的高赤字下一直难以为乌克兰战争提供资金。

items.title: XRP climbs toward $1.38 as Japan's Rakuten integrates token for payments
items.summary: Breakout backed by institutional flows and whale buying, with Japan adoption adding a fresh demand narrative.
items.title_zh: 随着日本乐天整合代币支付，XRP 攀升至 1.38 美元
items.summary_zh: 突破受到机构资金流和鲸鱼购买的支持，日本的采用增加了新的需求叙述。

items.title: Israel and Lebanon hold first direct talks since 1993
items.summary: A US statement said the two sides had agreed to launch direct negotiations, at a time and place to be determined.
items.title_zh: 以色列和黎巴嫩举行1993年以来首次直接会谈
items.summary_zh: 美国声明称，双方同意启动直接谈判，具体时间和地点待定。

items.title: A new class of crypto treasury companies is forming around Strategy’s high-yield stock
items.summary: Firms and protocols are accumulating Strategy’s preferred stock to capture yield and bitcoin-linked exposure.
items.title_zh: 围绕Strategy的高收益股票正在形成一类新的加密货币资金公司
items.summary_zh: 公司和协议正在积累 Strategy 的优先股，以获取收益和与比特币相关的风险敞口。

items.title: Ethereum treasury firm Bitmine reports $3.8 billion Q1 loss in latest filing
items.summary: The largest corporate ether holder posted a $3.8 billion quarterly loss as its pivot from mining to ETH accumulation continues.
items.title_zh: 以太坊财务公司 Bitmine 在最新文件中报告第一季度亏损 38 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 最大的企业以太币持有者公布季度亏损 38 亿美元，因为该公司继续从挖矿转向 ETH 积累。

items.title: Bitcoin's $76,000 breakout fails but a rare signal is hinting at major market bottom
items.summary: Derivatives funding rates have now remained negative for 46 days, a streak last seen following the FTX crash which marked the bottom of 2022's crypto winter.
items.title_zh: 比特币未能突破 76,000 美元，但罕见信号暗示主要市场已触底
items.summary_zh: 衍生品融资利率现已连续 46 天保持负值，这是在 FTX 崩盘之后出现的，标志着 2022 年加密货币冬季的底部。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: Jamie Dimon says Anthropic's Mythos reveals 'a lot more vulnerabilities' for cyberattacks
items.summary: The remarks show how a technology welcomed by corporations as a productivity boon can also pose serious threats, like uncovering new ways to hack into systems.
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 表示，Anthropic 的神话揭示了网络攻击的“更多漏洞”
items.summary_zh: 这些言论表明，一项因提高生产力而受到企业欢迎的技术也可能带来严重威胁，例如发现侵入系统的新方法。

items.title: Citigroup beats estimates, boosted by gains in fixed income
items.summary: Citigroup reported its best quarterly revenue in a decade and a 56% year-over-year jump in earnings per share.
items.title_zh: 固定收益收益推动花旗集团业绩好于预期
items.summary_zh: 花旗集团公布了十年来最好的季度营收，每股收益同比增长 56%。

items.title: Three years of messages at once - a chronicle of Sudan's war pours in as trapped reporter's phone turns on
items.summary: As the conflict enters its fourth year, journalist Mohamed Suleiman shudders at what has been lost.
items.title_zh: 三年的信息同时出现——当被困记者的手机打开时，苏丹战争的编年史涌入
items.summary_zh: 随着冲突进入第四个年头，记者穆罕默德·苏莱曼对所失去的一切感到不寒而栗。

items.title: Kanye West postpones France gig following UK ban
items.summary: It comes a week after the UK government announced it would block the rapper from entering the country.
items.title_zh: 坎耶·韦斯特 (Kanye West) 在英国禁令后推迟了法国演出
items.summary_zh: 一周前，英国政府宣布将阻止这位说唱歌手入境。

items.title: South Korea jails American YouTuber for public nuisance
items.summary: Johnny Somali sparked outrage after kissing a statue representing World War Two sex slaves.
items.title_zh: 韩国因公共滋扰罪入狱美国 YouTuber
items.summary_zh: 约翰尼·索马里在亲吻代表第二次世界大战性奴隶的雕像后引发了愤怒。

items.title: How Peter Magyar Defeated Viktor Orban, a Former Ally, In Hungary’s Election
items.summary: For years, Peter Magyar was a loyal ally of Viktor Orban, the far-right Hungarian leader. Then he changed sides — and defeated his former boss in a landslide victory on Sunday. Does he represent real change?
items.title_zh: 彼得·马扎尔 (Peter Magyar) 如何在匈牙利选举中击败前盟友欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orban)
items.summary_zh: 多年来，彼得·马扎尔 (Peter Magyar) 一直是匈牙利极右翼领导人欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orban) 的忠实盟友。然后他改变了立场，并在周日以压倒性胜利击败了他的前任老板。他代表了真正的改变吗？

items.title: As Bahrain Cracked Down Amid War, a Death in Custody Sparked Outrage
items.summary: The body of a man accused of spying for Iran, Mohammed al-Mousawi, showed signs of torture, witnesses said. The U.N. has called for an investigation.
items.title_zh: 巴林在战争中镇压，一名狱中死亡事件引发愤怒
items.summary_zh: 目击者称，被指控为伊朗从事间谍活动的男子穆罕默德·穆萨维的尸体上有遭受酷刑的迹象。联合国已呼吁进行调查。

items.title: Benin’s Romuald Wadagni Poised to Win Presidential Election
items.summary: Romuald Wadagni received 94 percent of the vote, according to provisional results. He faces the challenge of a growing jihadist insurgency in the region.
items.title_zh: 贝宁的罗穆尔德·瓦达尼有望赢得总统选举
items.summary_zh: 根据临时结果，罗穆尔德·瓦达尼 (Romuald Wadagni) 获得了 94% 的选票。他面临着该地区日益增长的圣战叛乱的挑战。

items.title: Will Viktor Orban’s Legacy Live On in Brussels, Even Without Him?
items.summary: Viktor Orban, Hungary’s newly ousted prime minister, helped to finance a Brussels think tank that pushes his populist vision. It will outlast him, at least for a while.
items.title_zh: 即使没有欧尔班·维克托，他的遗产也会在布鲁塞尔继续存在吗？
items.summary_zh: 匈牙利新近被罢黜的总理维克托·欧尔班 (Viktor Orban) 资助了布鲁塞尔一家智库，以推动他的民粹主义愿景。它会比他更长久，至少一段时间。

items.title: Bitcoin developers are trying to build quantum defenses. Your coins could pay the price.
items.summary: A proposal has been updated on Bitcoin's official repository, calling for freezing of quantum-vulnerable coins.
items.title_zh: 比特币开发者正在尝试建立量子防御。你的硬币可以付出代价。
items.summary_zh: 比特币官方存储库已更新一项提案，呼吁冻结易受量子影响的代币。

items.title: Ether-bitcoin ratio bounces from 2026 lows, signaling broader crypto recovery
items.summary: The ETH/BTC ratio hit its highest since January as Ethereum's network added 284,000 new users in Q1 and stablecoin supply reached a record $180 billion.
items.title_zh: 以太币与比特币比率从 2026 年低点反弹，预示着更广泛的加密货币复苏
items.summary_zh: 随着以太坊网络在第一季度新增 284,000 名新用户以及稳定币供应量达到创纪录的 1800 亿美元，ETH/BTC 比率创下 1 月份以来的最高水平。

items.title: 21Shares files second amendment to Hyperliquid ETF filing, seeks Nasdaq listing under THYP
items.summary: The issuer plans to buy 20,000 shares from the trust at $25 per share as an initial seed creation basket to buy HYPE prior to the listing.
items.title_zh: 21Shares 对 Hyperliquid ETF 备案文件进行第二次修订，寻求在 THYP 下在纳斯达克上市
items.summary_zh: 发行人计划以每股 25 美元的价格从该信托基金购买 20,000 股股票，作为在上市前购买 HYPE 的初始种子创建篮子。

items.title: Trending Crypto: RaveDAO (RAVE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #33.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：RaveDAO (RAVE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 33 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Enjin Coin (ENJ)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #226.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Enjin Coin (ENJ)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 226 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #13.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Hyperliquid (HYPE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 13。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Aria.AI (ARIA)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #814.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Aria.AI (ARIA)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#814。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bless (BLESS)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #471.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：祝福（BLESS）
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#471。

items.title: ChatGPT for marketing teams
items.summary: Learn how marketing teams use ChatGPT to plan campaigns, generate content, analyze performance, and move from ideas to execution faster.
items.title_zh: 营销团队的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解营销团队如何使用 ChatGPT 来规划营销活动、生成内容、分析绩效以及更快地将想法转化为执行。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Preview tool helps makers visualize 3D-printed objects
items.summary: By quickly generating aesthetically accurate previews of fabricated objects, the VisiPrint system could make prototyping faster and less wasteful.
items.title_zh: 预览工具可帮助创客可视化 3D 打印物体
items.summary_zh: 通过快速生成美观准确的预制件预览，VisiPrint 系统可以加快原型制作速度并减少浪费。

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员利用人工智能发现材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_zh: 一种新模型可测量可用来提高材料机械强度、传热和能量转换效率的缺陷。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 03/31/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Tuesday, 03/31/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Selling Volatility: The Most Seductive Backtest in Finance [Quantt] Here is a strategy with a thirty-year track record. Se
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日星期二 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！卖出波动性：金融领域最诱人的回测 [Quantt] 这是一个拥有三十年记录的策略。硒

items.title: Ripple, Kyobo Life Insurance partner to enable tokenized government bond settlement in South Korea
items.summary: The partnership could shorten settlement cycles from the typical two-day window to near real-time, the firms said.
items.title_zh: Ripple 与 Kyobo Life Insurance 合作伙伴在韩国实现代币化政府债券结算
items.summary_zh: 两家公司表示，此次合作可以将结算周期从典型的两天窗口缩短为近乎实时。

items.title: Ether.fi commits $3 billion in ETH as ‘validator liquidity’ to ETHGas over three years
items.summary: ETHGas is a marketplace for Ethereum blockspace futures that allows blockspace to be bought and sold in advance for guaranteed execution.
items.title_zh: Ether.fi 在三年内向 ETHGas 承诺价值 30 亿美元的 ETH 作为“验证者流动性”
items.summary_zh: ETHGas 是以太坊区块空间期货的市场，允许提前买卖区块空间以保证执行。

items.title: Hive, Bitfarms lead bitcoin miner-turned-AI rally with 11% gains as BTC hits two-month high
items.summary: Bitcoin climbed above $76,100 to a two-month high, while U.S. equities recovered most of their losses tied to the conflict in Iran.
items.title_zh: 随着 BTC 触及两个月高点，Hive 和 Bitfarms 涨幅达 11%，引领比特币矿机转型人工智能涨势
items.summary_zh: 比特币攀升至 76,100 美元以上，创两个月高点，而美国股市则收复了因伊朗冲突而造成的大部分损失。

items.title: Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 带有句子变压器的多模态嵌入和重新排序模型

items.title: Training mRNA Language Models Across 25 Species for $165
items.title_zh: 训练 25 个物种的 mRNA 语言模型，仅需 165 美元

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in March 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from March 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 3 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 3 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
items.summary: Veo 3.1 Lite is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最具成本效益的视频生成模型 Veo 3.1 Lite 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Veo 3.1 Lite 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems
items.summary: MIT researchers developed a testing framework that pinpoints situations where AI decision-support systems are not treating people and communities fairly.
items.title_zh: 评估自治系统的伦理
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了一个测试框架，可以查明人工智能决策支持系统不公平对待人和社区的情况。

items.title: David Einhorn signals caution as his hedge fund Greenlight prioritizes capital protection
items.summary: "It probably won't surprise anyone that we are again putting capital preservation at the top of our priorities," Einhorn said in his latest investor letter.
items.title_zh: 大卫·艾因霍恩 (David Einhorn) 表示谨慎，他的对冲基金 Greenlight 优先考虑资本保护
items.summary_zh: 艾因霍恩在最新的投资者信中表示：“我们再次将资本保值作为我们的首要任务，这可能不会令任何人感到惊讶。”

items.title: Global recession is inevitable if Strait of Hormuz stays shut, says Citadel's Ken Griffin
items.summary: A prolonged blockage of the Strait of Hormuz for the next six to 12 months will mean an unavoidable recession, the billionaire investor said.
items.title_zh: Citadel 的 Ken Griffin 表示，如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，全球经济衰退将不可避免
items.summary_zh: 这位亿万富翁投资者表示，未来 6 到 12 个月霍尔木兹海峡的长期封锁将意味着不可避免的经济衰退。

items.title: JPMorgan tops estimates on Wall Street results, Dimon flags 'increasingly complex' economic risks
items.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon called the economy resilient, but pointed to an "increasingly complex set of risks" across global markets.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通高于华尔街业绩预期，戴蒙表示经济风险“日益复杂”
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙称经济具有弹性，但指出全球市场“日益复杂的风险”。

items.title: Goldman Sachs tops estimates on record equities trading
items.summary: Goldman Sachs posted record equities trading revenue for the first quarter, helping propel the overall firm to its second-highest quarterly revenue.
items.title_zh: 高盛股票交易创历史新高
items.summary_zh: 高盛第一季度股票交易收入创下历史新高，帮助该公司创下第二高季度收入。

items.title: 'Bit of pain' worth long-term security from Iran, Bessent tells BBC
items.summary: US Treasury Secretary said a "small bit of economic pain" was worth it to eliminate the threat of Iranian strikes on Western capitals.
items.title_zh: 贝森特告诉英国广播公司，“一点痛苦”值得伊朗长期保护
items.summary_zh: 美国财政部长表示，为了消除伊朗对西方首都发动袭击的威胁，“一点点经济痛苦”是值得的。

items.title: Magyar meets Hungarian president as Trump says next PM 'a good man'
items.summary: The man who ended Viktor Orbán's 16 years of continuous rule, Péter Magyar, is calling for a speedy transfer of power.
items.title_zh: 马扎尔会见匈牙利总统，特朗普称下一任总理是“好人”
items.summary_zh: 结束维克托·欧尔班 16 年连续统治的人彼得·马扎尔 (Péter Magyar) 呼吁迅速移交权力。

items.title: 250 missing after migrant boat sinks in Indian Ocean
items.summary: The trawler "reportedly sank due to heavy winds, rough seas and overcrowding", the United Nations said.
items.title_zh: 印度洋移民船沉没 250人失踪
items.summary_zh: 联合国称，这艘拖网渔船“据报道因强风、波涛汹涌的海面和过度拥挤而沉没”。

items.title: South Africa names apartheid-era politician as new ambassador to the US
items.summary: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.
items.title_zh: 南非任命种族隔离时代政治家为新驻美国大使
items.summary_zh: 罗尔夫·迈耶在结束南非白人少数统治的谈判中作为谈判代表发挥了关键作用。

items.title: Australian pleads guilty to creating deepfake porn in landmark case
items.summary: The 19-year-old is the first person to be charged under a new national law.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚人承认在具有里程碑意义的案件中制作深度伪造色情内容
items.summary_zh: 这位 19 岁的男子是第一个根据新的国家法律受到指控的人。

items.title: Watch: Vance heckled as he chides Pope
items.summary: The US Vice-President was speaking at a Turning Point USA event, where he said Pope Leo should "be careful when he talks about matters of theology."
items.title_zh: 观看：万斯斥责教皇时质问
items.summary_zh: 美国副总统在“美国转折点”活动上发表讲话，他说教皇利奥“在谈论神学问题时应该小心”。

items.title: What Happened After Denmark Adopted a Ruined City in Ukraine
items.summary: The Danish government has contributed more than $250 million to Mykolaiv, as the Trump administration pushes a more business-focused plan.
items.title_zh: 丹麦收养乌克兰一座废墟城市后发生了什么
items.summary_zh: 随着特朗普政府推行一项更加以商业为中心的计划，丹麦政府已向尼古拉耶夫捐赠了超过 2.5 亿美元。

items.title: Mark Carney Seals a Majority Government and Remakes Canada’s Liberal Party
items.summary: The rising star in global centrist politics has secured a majority in the Canadian Parliament. Critics are crying foul.
items.title_zh: 马克·卡尼组建多数政府并重塑加拿大自由党
items.summary_zh: 全球中间派政治的后起之秀已在加拿大议会中获得多数席位。批评者们大声疾呼。

items.title: With Algeria Visit, Pope Leo Returns to His Augustinian Roots
items.summary: Some theologians say the pontiff’s understanding of Augustine’s teachings helped inform his response to President Trump’s negative comments about him.
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥访问阿尔及利亚，回归奥古斯丁根源
items.summary_zh: 一些神学家表示，教皇对奥古斯丁教义的理解有助于他对特朗普总统对他的负面评论的回应。

items.title: Why this ex-Solana exec is using a Wall Street trick to level the playing field in DeFi
items.summary: DoubleZero’s private fiber network aims to eliminate latency advantages like Hyperliquid’s Tokyo edge, but exchanges have yet to show an interest.
items.title_zh: 为什么这位前 Solana 高管正在使用华尔街的伎俩来创造 DeFi 的公平竞争环境
items.summary_zh: DoubleZero 的私有光纤网络旨在消除 Hyperliquid 东京边缘等延迟优势，但交易所尚未表现出兴趣。

items.title: EToro to acquire crypto wallet Zengo in $70 million deal
items.summary: The acquisition ties in the retail trading platform with advanced wallet technology meant to help protect users' assets.
items.title_zh: EToro 将以 7000 万美元收购加密钱包 Zengo
items.summary_zh: 此次收购将零售交易平台与先进的钱包技术联系起来，旨在帮助保护用户的资产。

items.title: TeraWulf shares fall after upsized $900 million equity raise to fund AI data center buildout
items.summary: TeraWulf shares slid in pre-market trading after upsizing its equity raise to $900 million to fund an AI data center campus.
items.title_zh: TeraWulf 增资 9 亿美元为人工智能数据中心建设提供资金后股价下跌
items.summary_zh: TeraWulf 为人工智能数据中心园区筹集资金至 9 亿美元后，其股价在盘前交易中下跌。

items.title: Societe Generale unit adds MiCA-compliant stablecoin to MetaMask
items.summary: Societe Generale's digital asset unit added its MiCA compliant USD stablecoin to MetaMask for fiat on- and off-ramps and trading.
items.title_zh: 法国兴业银行部门向 MetaMask 添加符合 MiCA 的稳定币
items.summary_zh: 法国兴业银行的数字资产部门将其符合 MiCA 的美元稳定币添加到 MetaMask 中，用于法定货币的进出和交易。

items.title: Virginia to hold dormant crypto ‘in-kind’ for at least one year under new law
items.summary: The legislation stipulates that unclaimed crypto assets in customer accounts will be transferred to state custody in-kind.
items.title_zh: 根据新法律，弗吉尼亚州将“实物”休眠加密货币至少一年
items.summary_zh: 该立法规定，客户账户中无人认领的加密资产将以实物形式转移至国家托管。

items.title: Major European SIX Group stock exchanges feeding data to Chainlink
items.summary: SIX Groups' two primary stock exchanges, SIX Swiss Exchange and BME Exchange, will now push their equities market data onchain.
items.title_zh: 欧洲六大集团主要证券交易所向 Chainlink 提供数据
items.summary_zh: SIX 集团的两个主要证券交易所，SIX Swiss Exchange 和 BME Exchange，现在将把其股票市场数据推送到链上。

items.title: Bitmine posts $3.8 billion quarterly net loss driven by unrealized ETH decline
items.summary: The company recently announced that it held 4.87 million ETH as of April 12, commanding over 4% of the total ether supply.
items.title_zh: 由于未实现的 ETH 下跌，Bitmine 公布季度净亏损 38 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 该公司最近宣布，截至 4 月 12 日，其持有 487 万枚 ETH，占以太坊总供应量的 4% 以上。

items.title: X rolls out ‘Cashtags’ for in-timeline crypto and stock data
items.summary: Nikita Bier, head of product at X, said the 'Cashtags' feature enables users to browse stock and cryptocurrency data such as price charts.
items.title_zh: X 推出了用于实时加密货币和股票数据的“Cashtags”
items.summary_zh: X 产品主管 Nikita Bier 表示，“Cashtags”功能使用户能够浏览股票和加密货币数据，例如价格图表。

items.title: Trusted access for the next era of cyber defense
items.summary: OpenAI expands its Trusted Access for Cyber program, introducing GPT-5.4-Cyber to vetted defenders and strengthening safeguards as AI cybersecurity capabilities advance.
items.title_zh: 下一个网络防御时代的可信访问
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 扩展了其可信网络访问计划，向经过审查的防御者引入 GPT-5.4-Cyber​​，并随着 AI 网络安全能力的进步而加强保障措施。

items.title: Enterprises power agentic workflows in Cloudflare Agent Cloud with OpenAI
items.summary: Cloudflare brings OpenAI’s GPT-5.4 and Codex to Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build, deploy, and scale AI agents for real-world tasks with speed and security.
items.title_zh: 企业通过 OpenAI 为 Cloudflare Agent Cloud 中的代理工作流程提供支持
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 将 OpenAI 的 GPT-5.4 和 Codex 引入 Agent Cloud，使企业能够快速、安全地构建、部署和扩展用于实际任务的 AI 代理。

items.title: ChatGPT for finance teams
items.summary: Learn how finance teams use ChatGPT to streamline reporting, analyze data, improve forecasts, and communicate insights more clearly.
items.title_zh: 面向财务团队的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解财务团队如何使用 ChatGPT 简化报告、分析数据、改进预测并更清晰地传达见解。

items.title: Getting started with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT, start your first conversation, and discover simple ways to write, brainstorm, and solve problems with AI.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 入门
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT，开始您的第一次对话，并发现使用 AI 进行写作、集思广益和解决问题的简单方法。

items.title: Financial services
items.summary: Explore AI resources for financial services, including prompt packs, GPTs, guides, and tools to help institutions deploy and scale AI securely.
items.title_zh: 金融服务
items.summary_zh: 探索金融服务的人工智能资源，包括提示包、GPT、指南和工具，以帮助机构安全地部署和扩展人工智能。

items.title: Our response to the Axios developer tool compromise
items.summary: OpenAI responds to the Axios supply chain attack by rotating macOS code signing certificates, updating apps, and confirming no user data was compromised.
items.title_zh: 我们对 Axios 开发者工具妥协的回应
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过轮换 macOS 代码签名证书、更新应用程序并确认没有用户数据受到损害来响应 Axios 供应链攻击。

items.title: Brainstorming with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT to brainstorm ideas, organize thinking, and turn rough concepts into structured, actionable plans.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 进行头脑风暴
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 集思广益、组织思维，并将粗略的概念转化为结构化、可操作的计划。

items.title: Responsible and safe use of AI
items.summary: Learn how to use AI responsibly with best practices for safety, accuracy, and transparency when using tools like ChatGPT.
items.title_zh: 负责任且安全地使用人工智能
items.summary_zh: 了解在使用 ChatGPT 等工具时如何负责任地使用人工智能以及实现安全性、准确性和透明度的最佳实践。

items.title: Writing with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to use ChatGPT for writing to draft, revise, and refine content with clear structure, tone, and intent.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 进行写作
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 进行写作，以清晰的结构、语气和意图起草、修改和完善内容。

items.title: Meet HoloTab by HCompany. Your AI browser companion.
items.title_zh: 了解 HCompany 的 HoloTab。您的人工智能浏览器伴侣。

items.title: Waypoint-1.5: Higher-Fidelity Interactive Worlds for Everyday GPUs
items.title_zh: Waypoint-1.5：适用于日常 GPU 的更高保真度交互世界

items.title: ALTK‑Evolve: On‑the‑Job Learning for AI Agents
items.title_zh: ALTK‑Evolve：AI 代理的在职学习

items.title: Safetensors is Joining the PyTorch Foundation
items.title_zh: Safetensors 即将加入 PyTorch 基金会

items.title: Welcome Gemma 4: Frontier multimodal intelligence on device
items.title_zh: 欢迎 Gemma 4：设备上的前沿多模式智能

items.title: Falcon Perception
items.title_zh: 猎鹰感知

items.title: Any Custom Frontend with Gradio's Backend
items.title_zh: 任何带有 Gradio 后端的自定义前端

items.title: Granite 4.0 3B Vision: Compact Multimodal Intelligence for Enterprise Documents
items.title_zh: Granite 4.0 3B Vision：企业文档的紧凑型多模式智能

items.title: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
items.summary: Skills in Chrome let you discover, save and remix AI workflows — and repeat them instantly.
items.title_zh: 将您最好的 AI 提示变成 Chrome 中的一键式工具
items.summary_zh: Chrome 中的技能可让您发现、保存和重新混合 AI 工作流程 - 并立即重复它们。

items.title: Bringing people together at AI for the Economy Forum
items.summary: Google is bringing people together in Washington D.C. at our AI for the Economy Forum.
items.title_zh: 人工智能经济论坛将人们聚集在一起
items.summary_zh: 谷歌将人们聚集在华盛顿特区，参加我们的人工智能经济论坛。

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.title_zh: 观看 James Manyika 与 LL COOL J 谈论人工智能和创造力。
items.summary_zh: 在我们的技术与社会对话系列的最新一集中，LL COOL J 与 James Manyika 进行了访谈。

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
items.summary: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
items.title_zh: 将您的耳机变成 iOS 上的实时个人翻译器。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译的耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆 iOS！我们正在将 iOS 和 Android 用户的功能扩展到更多国家/地区……

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live：让音频AI更加自然可靠
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Q&A: MIT SHASS and the future of education in the age of AI
items.summary: As the School of Humanities, Arts, and Social Sciences marks 75 years, Dean Agustín Rayo reflects on how AI is reshaping higher education and why SHASS disciplines continue to be central to MIT’s mission.
items.title_zh: 问答：MIT SHASS 和人工智能时代教育的未来
items.summary_zh: 在人文、艺术和社会科学学院成立 75 周年之际，院长 Agustín Rayo 反思了人工智能如何重塑高等教育，以及为什么 SHASS 学科仍然是麻省理工学院使命的核心。

items.title: Sixteen new START.nano companies are developing hard-tech solutions with the support of MIT.nano
items.summary: Startup accelerator program grows to over 30 companies, almost half of them with MIT pedigrees.
items.title_zh: 十六家新的 START.nano 公司正在 MIT.nano 的支持下开发硬技术解决方案
items.summary_zh: 创业加速器计划已发展到超过 30 家公司，其中几乎一半拥有 MIT 出身。

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
items.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
items.title_zh: 致力于推进核复兴
items.summary_zh: 核科学与工程系助理教授 Dean Price 看到了核电的光明前景，并相信人工智能可以帮助我们实现这一愿景。
